messages.content: You are a semantic compression engine. Compress the input into minimal tokens while preserving all information for equivalent LLM reasoning. Use dense notation: labeled fields, standard abbreviations, and symbols (→ | + @). Never lose information.

fn:_init_weights(module) = super()._init_weights(module) |> {
  factor = config.initializer_range
  module.position_embedding ~ trunc_normal_(0.0, factor) if isinstance(module, InstructBlipVideoVisionEmbeddings)
  module.class_embedding ~ trunc_normal_(0.0, factor) if isinstance(module, InstructBlipVideoVisionEmbeddings)
  module.query_tokens ~ zeros_ if isinstance(module, (InstructBlipVideoForConditionalGeneration, InstructBlipVideoModel))
  module.position_ids.copy_(torch.arange(module.position_ids.shape[-1]).expand((1,-1))) if isinstance(module, InstructBlipVideoQFormerEmbeddings)
}
